description.text: The helix angle determines the direction of the teeth. The helix angle is measured between the axis and the tooth. If the helix angle = 0°, the teeth are straight. If the helix angle > 0°, the teeth are helical

definition.text: The helix angle determines the direction of the teeth. The helix angle is measured between the axis and the tooth. If the helix angle = 0°, the teeth are straight. If the helix angle > 0°, the teeth are helical
